title: Fix Celery Migration: Permissions and Event Loop
description: Fix permission denied for media directory and event loop closure in Celery migration tasks
requirements: Fix permission denied: ensure /app/media/products directory exists with correct permissions in Docker
Fix event loop closure: properly dispose async engines in Celery tasks
Update migration_tasks.py: wrap async code in asyncio.run() and dispose engines in finally block
Update Dockerfile: create media directories with correct ownership (USER celery or www-data)
Update docker-compose.yml: ensure media volume has correct permissions
Add error handling: catch PermissionError and log clear message with solution
Test: verify migration runs without permission errors and event loop warnings
acceptance_criteria: No 'Event loop is closed' errors in logs
Async engines properly disposed after each task
Migration completes successfully with images downloaded
implementation_notes: In migration_tasks.py: use try/finally to dispose engines
In Dockerfile: RUN mkdir -p /app/media/products /app/media/blog && chown -R celery:celery /app/media
In docker-compose.yml: add volume ./media:/app/media with correct permissions
Wrap async session usage: async with engine.begin() as conn: ... finally: await engine.dispose()
Log clear error: logger.error('media_permission_error', path=path, solution='Check Docker volume permissions')
